appDescription.description: The description of the application, displayed in the web store and in chrome://extensions.

appName.description: The title of the application, displayed in the web store.

homeconnectionerror.message: The home server can not be reached. Please verify your Internet connection and then press Retry, or exit the app and try again.

testnavconnectionerror.message: The testing server can not be reached. Please verify your Internet connection and then press Retry, or choose a different customer, or exit the app and try again.
